title: ✨ The Chrono Precision Update! ⏱️
message: We've fine-tuned our engine tracking and tailored the interfaces to ensure every single tick of your clock stays buttery-smooth.
points: ⏱️ Zero-Guard Counter Fix: Resolved a bug where the countdown timer could become unresponsive or trigger incorrectly when resting at absolute zero.
📅 Immersive Event Tracker: Smart-hiding controls now automatically clear away play/pause configurations when tracking non-stoppable future date events.
🎨 Compact Input Formats: Re-engineered layout padding inside the custom duration dials to eliminate text clipping across varied device displays.
🧼 Clean Capture Mode: Enhanced screen-sharing workflows to drop system elements cleanly so you can display your personalized focus dashboard.

title: ✨ The Zenith Update Hub! 🚀
message: We've crafted a beautiful new way to keep you perfectly in sync with our latest clocks, timers, and focus tools.
points: 🔔 In-App Updater: Get instantly notified about fresh features directly from the home screen.
📖 Cinematic Changelogs: Discover exactly what's new the moment you update your app.
🔄 Manual Check: Check for new versions anytime with the new dynamic status icon.
⚡ Performance Boost: Under-the-hood tweaks for an even smoother, distraction-free experience.
